creator: jdli@FreeBSD.csie.NCTU.edu.tw
text:
new release of xsysinfo-1.4a

Fix: 

Hello !!
	
	Thanks for Gary Jennejohn <garyj@muc.de>, who provides the patch
	to use the new devstat library.

	xsysinfo-1.4a is just xsysinfo-1.4 + patcha[a-c] + devstat-patch,
	nothing new else.
		
Location: ftp://freebsd.csie.nctu.edu.tw/pub/jdli/source/xsysinfo-1.4a.tar.gz
	  
	Please commit it for me, thanks.
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
